https://blog.csdn.net/justlpf/article/details/128001413

harbor手动创建一个项目名为openshift

创建一个openshift临时安装目录
 mkdir -p /opt/okd-install/4.10.0/
 cd /opt/okd-install/4.10.0/


 红帽网站注册账号 --> consle.redhad.com --> 下载 pull-secret
  u588@sina.com  1234567@uytrewq 

mkdir -p /opt/okd-install/
cd /opt/okd-install/

下载 pull-secret --> pull-secret.txt
转换为json格式
apt install -y jq
cat ./pull-secret.txt | jq . > pull-secret.json

生成本地harbor镜像仓库base64位的加密口令
echo -n 'ts:12345@Qwert' | base64 -w0

创建harbor镜像仓库登录文件
cat >pull-secret-local.json<<EOF
{
    "auths":{
        "registry.tsdc.io:443":{
            "auth":"dHM6MTIzNDVAUXdlcnQ=",
            "email":"ts@163.com"
        }
    }
}
EOF

将harbor镜像仓库登录文件内容追加到，最终

cat > pull-secret.json <<EOF
{
  "auths": {
    "cloud.openshift.com": {
      "auth": "b3BlbnNoaWZ0LXJlbGVhc2UtZGV2K29jbV9hY2Nlc3NfYTQ3ZmNjODdkZjJlNDg3MWEzYzBjNTU4ODBlMDI4OTY6UkpaVFIySlZRQ0NTVlAyTFZMRTRLNjRTV1ZZT1ZPQTM0VldESVVKSEdEUzkzT0VRUDVJSUtHODZVNjc0QVJRUg==",
      "email": "u588@sina.com"
    },
    "quay.io": {
      "auth": "b3BlbnNoaWZ0LXJlbGVhc2UtZGV2K29jbV9hY2Nlc3NfYTQ3ZmNjODdkZjJlNDg3MWEzYzBjNTU4ODBlMDI4OTY6UkpaVFIySlZRQ0NTVlAyTFZMRTRLNjRTV1ZZT1ZPQTM0VldESVVKSEdEUzkzT0VRUDVJSUtHODZVNjc0QVJRUg==",
      "email": "u588@sina.com"
    },
    "registry.connect.redhat.com": {
      "auth": "",
      "email": "u588@sina.com"
    },
    "registry.redhat.io": {
      "auth": "",
      "email": "u588@sina.com"
    },
    "registry.tsdc.io:443":{
        "auth":"dHM6MTIzNDVAUXdlcnQ=",
        "email":"ts@163.com"
    }
  }
}
EOF
================= 添加服务器信任(在需要使用harbor的服务器上) ===============
cp ca.crt registry.tsdc.io.crt /usr/local/share/ca-certificates/

debain -->  /usr/sbin/update-ca-certificates

mkdir -p /etc/docker/certs.d/registry.tsdc.io:443
cp registry.tsdc.io.cert /etc/docker/certs.d/registry.tsdc.io:443/
cp registry.tsdc.io.key /etc/docker/certs.d/registry.tsdc.io:443/
cp ca.crt /etc/docker/certs.d/registry.tsdc.io:443/



oc adm -a ./pull-secret.json release mirror \
     --from=quay.io/openshift/okd:4.13.0-0.okd-2023-05-22-052007 \
     --to=registry.tsdc.io:443/openshift/okd \
     --to-release-image=registry.tsdc.io:443/openshift/okd:4.13.0-0.okd-2023-05-22-052007



================= 拉去镜像完成 =================

imageContentSources:
- mirrors:
  - registry.tsdc.io:443/openshift/okd
  source: quay.io/openshift/okd
- mirrors:
  - registry.tsdc.io:443/openshift/okd
  source: quay.io/openshift/okd-content


To use the new mirrored repository for upgrades, use the following to create an ImageContentSourcePolicy:

apiVersion: operator.openshift.io/v1alpha1
kind: ImageContentSourcePolicy
metadata:
  name: example
spec:
  repositoryDigestMirrors:
  - mirrors:
    - registry.tsdc.io:443/openshift/okd
    source: quay.io/openshift/okd
  - mirrors:
    - registry.tsdc.io:443/openshift/okd
    source: quay.io/openshift/okd-content
